title: Sheffield Heavy Rain
lead: Sheffield is experiencing heavy rain with a Z-Score of -3.26. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heavy rain in Sheffield is causing significant disruptions. 
 The city is expected to receive more rain throughout the day. 
 With an Umidita of 89% and Vento of 13.7 km/h, conditions are hazardous.
